info.title: bookmarkr
info.description: Bookmarkr is a bookmarks manager provided as a CLI application.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Bookmarkr is a bookmark manager provided as a CLI application.

commands.name: export
commands.description: Exports all bookmarks to a file

commands.name: import
commands.description: Imports all bookmarks from a file

commands.name: sync
commands.description: sync local and remote bookmark stores
